description: Various stats about the game for advanced players.

game.description: Contains data about the game overall.

avg_shots.description: Represents the average number of shots per rally.

game_outcome.description: the result (e.g., points scored) by each team

anyOf.description: we don't know the team's score or whether they won or lost
whether the team won or lost (we don't know how points they scored)
how many points the team scored (and by comparing it with the other team's score, we can also determine which team win)')

items.description: Describes the team's result (score or won/lost, if known)
items.title: Game Outcome for Team

kitchen_rallies.description: Represents the number of rallies where all players get to the kitchen.

longest_rally.description: Contains the rally index and number of shots for the longest rally in the game.

num_shots.description: Number of shots in the longest rally.

rally_idx.description: The rally which was the longest (0 is the first rally in the game).

longest_rally.title: Longest Rally

min_points.description: Minimal amount of points needed to win, as in "first to 11".

relative_adjustments.description: Outputs from the relative DUPr adjustment models. These numbers expose how strongly the ML models nudged ratings between the two teams (Stage 2) and between partners on each team (Stage 3).

between_teams.description: Team-differential correction based on comparative performance of the teams. Each player on the higher-ranked team receives +between_teams/4, while the opponents get -between_teams/4. Positive values indicate the model boosted the predicted winners, negative values indicate a penalty.

within_teams.description: Partner-differential corrections. Index 0 is the within-team adjustment applied between players 0 and 1, index 1 is applied between players 2 and 3.

scoring.description: The scoring system most likely used in the game.

team_percentage_to_kitchen.description: Percent of rallies where all players on a team successfully arrived at the kitchen.

game.title: Game Data

players.description: Each player's advanced stats over the whole game.  If the player's location is unknown, the value for that player will be null.

anyOf.description: Contains player-specific stats over the whole game.

average_shot_quality.description: The average quality score of all shots taken by the player.
average_shot_quality.title: Quality Score

average_x_coverage_percentage.description: The average percentage of court width coverage assigned to the player during rallies, based on their positioning relative to their partner. It's only relevant in doubles; not included for singles games.
average_x_coverage_percentage.title: Percentage

backhands.description: Stats about backhands. Omitted if the player did not hit any backhands.

average_baseline_distance.description: Average distance from the opponent's baseline

average_height_above_net.description: Average height above the net as the ball crosses it

median_baseline_distance.description: Median distance from the opponent's baseline

median_height_above_net.description: Median height above the net as the ball crosses it

outcome_stats.description: Categorizes shot outcomes for this type of shot. Omitted if there are none attempted.

attempt_percentage.description: The percentage of attempted shots out of the total opportunities for the shot.
attempt_percentage.title: Percentage

high_quality_shot_rally_won_percentage.description: The percentage of high quality shots where the player's team won the rally. A high quality shot has a score of .8 or greater. Omitted if no high quality shots were attempted.
high_quality_shot_rally_won_percentage.title: Percentage

low_quality_shot_rally_won_percentage.description: The percentage of low quality shots where the player's team won the rally. A high quality shot has a score of .4 or less. Omitted if no low quality shots were attempted.
low_quality_shot_rally_won_percentage.title: Percentage

net_fault_percentage.description: The percentage of shots that hit the net out of the total attempts.
net_fault_percentage.title: Percentage

out_fault_percentage.description: The percentage of shots hit out of the total attempts.
out_fault_percentage.title: Percentage

rally_won_percentage.description: The percentage of rallies won out of the total number of rallies with attempts
rally_won_percentage.title: Percentage

success_percentage.description: The percentage of successful shots out of the total attempts.
success_percentage.title: Percentage

outcome_stats.title: Shot Outcome Stats

average.description: The average shot speed across all shots by the player (MPH).
average.title: Speed

fastest.description: The fastest shot by the player (MPH).
fastest.title: Speed

median.description: The median shot speed across all shots by the player (MPH).
median.title: Speed

backhands.title: Shot Stats

ball_directions.description: Categorizes ball directions across a player's shots (9 total).

down_the_line_left_count.description: A shot played from the left straight down the left sideline.
down_the_line_left_count.title: Count

down_the_line_right_count.description: A shot played from the right straight down the right sideline.
down_the_line_right_count.title: Count

down_the_middle_count.description: A shot played from the middle straight down the middle of the court.
down_the_middle_count.title: Count

left_cross_right_count.description: A shot played from the left side of the court that crosses over to the right side.
left_cross_right_count.title: Count

left_to_middle_count.description: A shot played from the left side of the court towards the middle.
left_to_middle_count.title: Count

mid_cross_left_count.description: A shot played from the middle of the court that crosses over to the left side.
mid_cross_left_count.title: Count

mid_cross_right_count.description: A shot played from the middle of the court that crosses over to the right side.
mid_cross_right_count.title: Count

right_cross_left_count.description: A shot played from the right side of the court that crosses over to the left side.
right_cross_left_count.title: Count

right_to_middle_count.description: A shot played from the right side of the court towards the middle.
right_to_middle_count.title: Count

ball_directions.title: Ball Directions

dinks.description: Stats about dink. Omitted if the player did not hit any dink.

average_height_above_net.description: Average height above the net as the ball crosses it

kitchen_area.title: Shot Stats

kitchen_arrival_percentage.description: Counts of fair kitchen-arrival opportunities (denominator) and successful arrivals (numerator), broken down by serving/returning roles for the player and their partner.

denominator.description: Number of rallies where the player had a fair opportunity to arrive within a few feet of the kitchen when on the returning team, as the returner (requires at least 3 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where the player successfully arrived within a few feet of the kitchen when on the returning team, as the returner (requires at least 3 non-fault shots).
numerator.title: Count

denominator.description: Number of rallies where the player had a fair opportunity to arrive within a few feet of the kitchen when on the returning team, as the partner of the returner (requires at least 3 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where the player successfully arrived within a few feet of the kitchen when on the returning team, as the partner of the returner (requires at least 3 non-fault shots).
numerator.title: Count

denominator.description: Number of rallies where the player had a fair opportunity to arrive within a few feet of the kitchen when on the serving team, as the server (requires at least 4 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where the player successfully arrived within a few feet of the kitchen when on the serving team, as the server (requires at least 4 non-fault shots).
numerator.title: Count

denominator.description: Number of rallies where the player had a fair opportunity to arrive within a few feet of the kitchen when on the serving team, as the partner of the server (requires at least 4 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where the player successfully arrived within a few feet of the kitchen when on the serving team, as the partner of the server (requires at least 4 non-fault shots).
numerator.title: Count

kitchen_arrival_percentage.title: Kitchen Arrival Opportunity Stats

team.description: The team to which the player belongs.

team_kitchen_arrival.description: Counts of rallies where both teammates had a fair opportunity to arrive at the kitchen (denominator) and both successfully arrived (numerator), broken down by serving/returning roles. Both players on the same team share identical values.

denominator.description: Number of rallies where both teammates had a fair opportunity to arrive at the kitchen when on the returning team (requires at least 3 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where both teammates arrived at the kitchen when on the returning team (requires at least 3 non-fault shots and both players having a fair opportunity).
numerator.title: Count

denominator.description: Number of rallies where both teammates had a fair opportunity to arrive at the kitchen when on the serving team (requires at least 4 non-fault shots).
denominator.title: Count

numerator.description: Number of rallies where both teammates arrived at the kitchen when on the serving team (requires at least 4 non-fault shots and both players having a fair opportunity).
numerator.title: Count

session.description: Defines aspects of the session or game being played.

session_index.description: Index of this session within the play session (starts at 0)

session_type.description: The type of session being played
